nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI as inefficient time sink with diminishing returns
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes the conversations can be quite long and I find myself trying to achieve a result that never comes

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for drafting
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to unique creative voice in specific content
nodes.grounding_span: I'll use AI to write me a first draft of that email each week and then I'll make my own amends

nodes.label: AI as creative copywriting assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as disrespectful bypass of writer's expertise when imposed by superiors
nodes.grounding_span: I also use AI to help me rework or edit copy that my colleagues have produced

nodes.label: AI as tool for career advancement
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to job security and devaluation of writing skill
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's better to embrace AI as a tool than to shun it

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool that undermines perceived value of writer's work
nodes.grounding_span: I've been encouraged to use AI a lot at work

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I need it to feel unique and not AI-generated

nodes.label: Validation and respect for expertise
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to be disrespected by having my work sent back to me with AI amends

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it will ultimately take me less time to write that kind of copy independently

nodes.label: Professional competence and future-proofing
nodes.grounding_span: I would consider a career in prompt engineering or AI-assisted writing

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's agreeableness
nodes.grounding_span: the AI tool kept only providing one heading

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I'll use AI to write me a first draft of that email each week

nodes.label: Resentment toward superiors imposing AI and devaluing writing
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like being told about the benefits of AI in my role by people who don't really understand my role

nodes.label: Optimism about AI for career advancement
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's better to embrace AI as a tool than to shun it

nodes.label: Anxiety about future job relevance
nodes.grounding_span: I wonder whether my job role will still exist in another decade

nodes.label: Strategic task differentiation — selective AI use based on task type
nodes.grounding_span: If I'm writing something templated... If I'm writing something more specific

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with diminishing returns awareness
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes it feels like we solve one issue but then another one pops up
